seo.title: Alex Spelucin | Data Strategy & Automation for Marketing Agencies
seo.description: Scale your agency with world-class data infrastructure. We automate your reporting, fix your tracking, and prove real ROI to your clients through advanced data engineering.

hero.title: The data department your agency needs to scale.
hero.description: We automate your reports, sanitize your ad tracking, and prove real ROI to your clients through AI agents and direct integrations.

problem.title: Your team wastes hours on manual tasks and your clients doubt the results.

reports.title: Manual Reporting
reports.desc: Your account managers waste entire Fridays cross-referencing Meta and GA4 data instead of optimizing campaigns.

tracking.title: Broken Tracking
tracking.desc: Data leaks, duplicate conversions, and pixels that stop measuring overnight without anyone noticing in time.

friction.title: Client Friction
friction.desc: When agency numbers don't match the client's CRM, trust breaks and the account is lost.

problem.footer: We eliminate technical friction. While your executives scale, we ensure the numbers match perfectly.

solution.title: Your own world-class data infrastructure.
solution.description: We take your agency from manual to total automation.

attribution.title: Clear Attribution
attribution.desc: Prove exactly where the sales are coming from.

dashboards.title: Modern Dashboards
dashboards.desc: Visualize your profitability without waiting for Monday.

tools.title: Our tools
tools.description: We connect and integrate the most robust stack on the market.

projects.title: E-commerce Reporting
projects.shortDesc: Unified attribution and blended CPC and ROAS control for Meta and Google.
projects.challenge: Chronic data dispersion between Meta Ads, Google Ads, and Shopify, which prevented a clear view of net ROAS. Media buyers lost 5+ hours weekly manually reconciling spreadsheets.
strategy: Data Blending infrastructure unifying ad API costs with real store transactions.
Real-time dashboard for CPC control and profitability (ROAS) alerts by channel or campaign.
Advanced Google Analytics implementation for Shopify or TiendaNube to sanitize records.
impact: 95% more accurate sales attribution. Total reduction of manual reporting tasks.
Ability to scale operations to more than 10 premium accounts without technical friction.
Precise calculation of combined ROAS and a clear view of real margin per channel.

projects.title: Analytics for Membership Sites
projects.shortDesc: Behavioral analysis and membership growth in Peru, Chile, and Colombia.
projects.challenge: Need to understand conversion rates and churn for recurring users in diverse markets. GA4 data failed to correctly capture critical subscription events.
strategy: GTM/GA4 audit and cleanup with implementation of deep event tracking (registrations, subscriptions).
Geographic cohort segmentation to detect retention efficiency in Peru, Chile, and Colombia.
Channel Efficiency: Strategic reallocation of efforts towards high user retention channels.
impact: Full visibility of the regional retention funnel segmented by country and user type.
18.4% reduction in bounce rate through navigation path optimization.

projects.title: Strategic SEO Intelligence
projects.shortDesc: Share of Voice and growth of queries, impressions, and clicks.
projects.challenge: Difficulty demonstrating the real value of SEO against the immediacy of paid ads. Lack of real-time competitive monitoring for tactical queries.
strategy: Automated 'Share of Voice' (SOV) monitoring system for competitor domains.
Advanced GSC analysis to detect 'low-hanging fruit' opportunities by crossing CTR vs. Position.
Query Explorer: Identification of content gaps based on technical search intent.
impact: Proven 70% increase in total organic sessions.
Technical justification of SEO investment through assisted attribution and conversion value data.
Content prioritization based on business Key Events, not just generic click volume.

projects.title: AI Attribution Innovation
projects.shortDesc: Measurement of traffic and conversions from AIs (ChatGPT, Gemini).
projects.challenge: Traffic from LLMs (ChatGPT, Gemini) is invisible in traditional tools, generating gaps in the measurement of new brand discovery sources.
strategy: AI Referrer detection architecture through header filtering and specific traffic patterns.
Technical dashboard to diagnose the real impact of generative AIs on user acquisition.
Landing Page Mapping: Identification of pages and guides most cited by language models.
impact: Positioning as a pioneer agency in the AI source measurement market.
Useful dashboard for diagnosis, sales support, and premium client prospecting.
Identification of 12.16% of key events originating from language model traffic.

bio.title: Alex Spelucin.
bio.description: I've spent 7 years building profitable data departments for agencies in LATAM. I know from the inside how the lack of technical measurement hampers your growth and burns your teams. My goal is not to sell you a dashboard or report, but to act as your in-house strategic partner so you can scale your agency with mathematical security.

process.title: How we secure your data in 4 steps.
process.description: A 4-step workflow designed to integrate your data infrastructure without interrupting your operations.

steps.title: Tracking Audit
steps.desc: We ensure your client's website has clean code and that platforms receive exact data via automated scripts.

steps.title: Implementation & Integration
steps.desc: We execute the technical changes needed for tracking and create connections (Pipelines) with data sources.

steps.title: Dashboard Design
steps.desc: We build custom dashboards. Useful for monthly client reporting and daily monitoring for your media buying team.

steps.title: Maintenance & Support
steps.desc: We monitor connectors, create reports for your new accounts, and resolve bugs on Slack before the client asks.

pricing.title: Pricing that scales with your client portfolio.
pricing.description: Forget about expensive fixed salaries. A predictable model based on the active accounts you manage.
pricing.question: How many active clients need reporting?
pricing.note: Note: The comparison includes burdened labor costs (salary + benefits) and the opportunity cost of manual management time.

items.q: What happens if I lose a client, does my rate go down?
items.a: Exactly. The model adapts to your reality. If you go from 10 to 5 active clients, you automatically move to the lower-cost Tier. Scale up and down without risk.

items.q: Do you have access to my clients' billing?
items.a: No. We work under strict Non-Disclosure Agreements (NDA). We only request view and edit access to technical platforms (GA4, GTM, Looker), never to the agency's financial billing.

items.q: How long does the initial Setup take?
items.a: The audit process and creation of master templates takes between 7 and 14 business days, depending on the current state of the infrastructure.

items.q: How do you communicate with my team?
items.a: We integrate into your workflow. We open a shared channel on Slack or Teams where your media buyers can tag us if there are data discrepancies or broken pixels.

items.q: Is this better than hiring a Junior Analyst?
items.a: A Junior costs you over $1,000 USD/month, requires training, and has high turnover. With us, you get Senior-level infrastructure, AI automation, and continuous support for a fraction of the cost.

items.q: How is the Setup and first month billed?
items.a: To start the audit and activation process, the Setup fee ($500 USD) is paid along with your first monthly installment. From the second month onwards, you only pay your flat rate based on your active client volume.

meier.quote: He created our analytics dashboard ensuring everything was structured and working perfectly. He solved tracking issues we hadn't mapped and left all connections ready. Totally recommended!

vergara.quote: His extensive technical knowledge achieves fascinating intersections between SEO and technology. He automated our reporting while always maintaining focus on business growth and client objectives.
vergara.role: Darío Vergara, SEO Lead @ Attach Media

ctaBanner.title: Stop wasting time on manual reports.
ctaBanner.description: Let's schedule 20 minutes to review your current stack and activate your Setup.
